title: run_realsfs_v1 — manifest contract for server-side realSFS compute
description: PLANNED. Validates POST /api/actions when type='run_realsfs'. Wraps `realSFS -fold 1 <sample>.saf.idx -P <ncores>` to produce {sample}.est.ml. Blocked: the SAF binaries (.saf.idx + .saf.gz + .saf.pos.gz) are not mirrored to E:/results_diversity/01_saf_per_sample/ today (only .arg log files are). See _handoff_docs/MISSING_DATA.md §1.
